description_long: This is an ornate, multi-branched candelabrum featuring three upright candles, each set in a distinct cup atop gracefully curved arms. The base is wide and faceted, providing stability, and the central stem is elegantly tapered with decorative ridges and contours. The material appears to be aged or patinated metal, likely brass or bronze, with a slightly greenish tint, giving it an antique look. The candles themselves are tall, cylindrical, and off-white, with visible wicks but no flames or wax drips. The overall design is classical, reminiscent of traditional European candle holders used for decorative or ceremonial purposes. This object would be well-suited for placement on a table or pedestal in an urban park, plaza, or as part of a street-side decorative installation.
description: A classical, three-armed metal candelabrum with tall, off-white candles and an ornate, faceted base. The design is antique and decorative, suitable for urban tabletop or pedestal display.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three candle arms symmetrically, with the central candle most prominent and the base fully visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the curvature of the arms and the depth of the candle cups, with the right arm more forward.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the profile of the candelabrum, with two arms visible in the foreground and one receding.
description_view_3: Opposite front view, similar to view 0 but with the left and right arms swapped in prominence.
